sessions.intent: Piece 5: Ingi-led code review and cleanup of pieces 1-4

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-4 (identity, crypto, signing, http) are complete and audited. Code was largely written by bots in the pipeline.
before.risk: Low — cleanup and polish, no new functionality.

sessions.plan: Ingi reviews the code personally and directs cleanup via coder. Architect role is minimal — branch setup and reporting only.

actions.context: Branch and report setup for piece 5

after.health: Branch created. Ingi driving review, coder executing changes.
after.notes: Scope: pieces 1-4 (identity, crypto, signing, http) plus any engine/infra changes that came with them (Settings→Config, Path→FileSystem, provider relocations).
